arts.ttl: Sunderland make statement move to sign Leicester City ace ahead of Sheffield United
arts.sum: Sunderland have bettered Sheffield United’s offer for Stoke City loanee Tom Cannon, according to Alan Nixon. Sunderland are… The post Sunderland make statement move to sign Leicester City ace ahead of Sheffield United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leicester plotting move to sign Champions League winner
arts.sum: Leicester City are hoping to land their old boy, Ben Chilwell, during the January transfer window after Chelsea made it clear he was surplus to requirements. West Ham’s Graham Potter is hopeful of a Chilwell reunion, but it’s also been reported that the Blues are struggling to offload the left-back because of his extortionate wages. […] The post Leicester plotting move to sign Champions League winner appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘Stand out’ player convinces Crystal Palace and Fulham – Duo could table offers
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and Fulham are in the picture for FC Midtjylland’s Ousmane Diao, according to a report. The centre-back arrived at the Danish club from Portuguese side CD Mafra last summer and signed a contract until 2029. Crystal Palace, Fulham and FC Porto have been following the defender, who has made 28 appearances so far The post ‘Stand out’ player convinces Crystal Palace and Fulham – Duo could table offers appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted line-up v Crystal Palace with three-way battle in contentious position
arts.sum: Jannik Vestergaard is fit again and while Wout Faes had a good game against QPR, it’s the Dane who has been a clear first-choice centre-back under van Nistelrooy, and he is expected to start alongside Conor Coady. El Khannouss was withdrawn on the hour mark against QPR to allow him to conserve fitness for the crucial match against fellow bottom-half side Palace, and Mavididi came off six minutes later.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leicester host Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy set to sell player who was a regular starter under Steve Cooper
arts.sum: According to Daily Mail, Leicester City are open to offers for Belgian defender Wout Faes, with the club valuing the 25-year-old at around £15 million. arts.ttl: Esse's move from Millwall to Palace edges closer
arts.sum: Millwall winger Romain Esse's move to Crystal Palace is edging closer, according to Lions boss Alex Neil.
